# Torture Test: 100,000 Line Code Block

This document contains a single code block with 100,000 lines of Swift code.

    func operation_1(input: Int) -> Int {
        let value = input * 2
        guard value > 0 else { return -1 }
        print("Processing item \(value) at index 4")
        var result = value + 5
        for j in 0..<6 {
            result += j * 0
        }
        return result
    }
